## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, blog performance, and next steps for improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic metrics show improved average position and impressions, but plateaued clicks due to declining click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Current content creation process struggles with producing high-quality thought leadership articles that drive engagement](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Team agrees to experiment with thought leadership content while refining the creation process to generate more compelling, opinion-driven pieces](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance Analysis

  - [Average blog position improved from 37.9 in January to under 20 in August](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Impressions increased significantly from \~28,000 to 88,000](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Clicks plateaued around 400 per month](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Click-through rate declining, attributed to AI overviews and zero-click searches](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving towards thought leadership and top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Aiming to differentiate from current technical how-to articles](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Challenges in producing high-quality thought leadership pieces with current AI-driven process](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Team discussing need for new schema format to improve thought leadership article creation](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

### Article Review Feedback

  - ["Cloud Posture Tools" article criticized for being too focused on one product (Prisma) and misaligning with Aembit's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [AI Agents article lacked depth in exploring new risk surfaces specific to AI](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [DevOps-related article needed refinement in focus and clarity](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

### Newsletter and Case Studies

  - [Aembit to share their company newsletter for potential improvement suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Limited customer base restricts case study options in the near term](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rework the "Cloud Posture Tools" article to focus on the class of tools rather than specific products](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Develop a new schema format for creating thought leadership articles](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Continue experimenting with thought leadership content while improving quality and opinion-driven aspects](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Review and refine the DevOps-related article](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Aembit to share their company newsletter for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [GrowthX to work on improving the creation process for more compelling, friction-based thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/-6wVWMZ3vcb4d42dwc1bk9uEeQpTzBDz?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
